description: Sleek and stylish, this analog wrist watch from fastrack& rsquo s Essentials Collection is designed for those women who love their everyday accessories. Case diameter: 20 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Triangle & bull Metallic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort & bull Metallic strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and style & bull White dial with brand name marking 6 o& rsquo clock and brand logo marking the 12 o& rsquo clock position & bull Quartz movement of time display & bull Screw to reset time & bull Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability & bull Water resistant up to 30 meters, which helps you wear it when swimming
